deleteAccount.title: Delete Account

manageInsoles.title: Manage Insoles
manageInsoles.chargeDevice: Charge device as soon as possible.

pairInsole.title: Pair Insole
pairInsole.description: To pair a new insole, visit the home tab, click the connection button in the top right corner, and switch on your FeetBack device.

unpairInsole.title: Unpair Insole
unpairInsole.description: Are you sure you want to unpair {{insoleName}}?

pressure.name: Pressure
pressure.description:
Average pressure distribution across feet, measured as a relative percentage of sensor capacity (%). A low pressure value indicates that the user may not be standing up, while a high pressure value indicates that the user may be performing strenuous load-bearing activity, such as running or jumping.

Typical pressure values range from {{lowerPressure}}‒{{upperPressure}}%.

alignment.name: Alignment
alignment.description:
Angular alignment of feet, measured by their difference in degrees (°). An alignment value of 0° indicates that the user's feet are facing the exact same direction.

Typical alignment values range from {{lowerAlignment}}‒{{upperAlignment}}°.

Both left and right insoles must be connected to view this metric value.

temperature.name: Temperature
temperature.description:
Average ambient temperature of feet, measured in degrees {{temperatureTypeName}} ({{temperatureTypeSymbol}}).

Typical temperature values range from {{lowerTemp}}‒{{upperTemp}}{{temperatureTypeSymbol}}.

notice.title: Notice
notice.description: All health insights are generated in accordance with insole data from the past {{threshold}} days.

notice.title: Notice
notice.description: All data is recorded and displayed in UTC (Coordinated Universal Time).

notification.title: Low Battery
notification.message: {{insoleName}} battery is low. Please switch off and charge insole.
